productDisplayName: Vans Men Rata Vulc Black Casual Shoes
description: Want to save the earth? This could be the answer – the uppers of this vans casual shoe are made of hemp – similar in feel to cotton canvas but hemp is incredibly easy to grow making it a smart sustainable choice for those trying to conserve the earth's resources. Not just ecologically friendly, Vans has also come up with a great, versatile shoe which will take you from day to evening thanks to the smart black colour and stylish shape. Upper Canvas uppers for durability and comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name tag on the side seam and on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
